**Sprint Duration:** April 13 вҖ“ April 26, 2026 (2 weeks)  
**Sprint Lead:** Alex Zhang (Backend Tech Lead)  
**Team:** Backend (Alex, Bai), Frontend (Chen), QA (Dana)

---

## Overview

Sprint 9 focuses on three core features critical for the Project Orion v2.0 launch: a real-time notifications system, advanced search with filtering capabilities, and a comprehensive role-based access control (RBAC) permission system.

---

## Feature 1: Real-Time Notifications System

### Objective
Implement a scalable real-time notifications system to keep users informed of project updates, task assignments, and mentions.

### Technical Approach

#### Architecture
- **Message Queue:** Redis Pub/Sub for lightweight event distribution
- **WebSocket Layer:** Socket.io for bidirectional real-time communication
- **Database:** PostgreSQL for persistent notification storage with TTL-based cleanup
- **API Gateway:** Rate limiting at 100 notifications/user/hour to prevent spam

#### Key Components
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Client    в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Җв”Җв–әв”Ӯ  Socket.io  в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Җв”Җв–әв”Ӯ  Redis Pub  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Browser)  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   Server    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ    /Sub     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                               в”Ӯ
                                        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                                        в”Ӯ PostgreSQL  в”Ӯ
                                        в”Ӯ (Persistent)в”Ӯ
                                        в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Implementation Details
- **Event Types:** Task assigned, comment mention, due date reminder, project invitation
- **Delivery Modes:** In-app (real-time), email (batched digest), push (mobile)
- **Scalability:** Horizontal scaling via Redis cluster; connection pooling (max 1000 concurrent per node)
- **Fallback:** Long-polling for clients without WebSocket support

#### API Endpoints
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/notifications` | Fetch paginated notification history |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/notifications/{id}/read` | Mark single notification as read |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/notifications/mark-all-read` | Bulk mark as read |
| DELETE | `/api/v1/notifications/{id}` | Soft delete notification |

#### Data Model
```sql
CREATE TABLE notifications (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    body TEXT,
    metadata JSONB,
    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    ttl TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days'
);

CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_user_read ON notifications(user_id, is_read, created_at DESC);
```

---

## Feature 2: Advanced Search & Filtering

### Objective
Enable users to efficiently find tasks, projects, and documents using full-text search with sophisticated filtering capabilities.

### Technical Approach

#### Search Engine
- **Primary:** Elasticsearch 8.x for full-text search and aggregations
- **Sync Strategy:** Change Data Capture (CDC) via Debezium for near real-time index updates
- **Fallback:** PostgreSQL trigram search for basic queries when ES unavailable

#### Indexing Strategy
```yaml
Indices:
  - tasks_v1:
      mappings:
        title: { type: text, analyzer: standard }
        description: { type: text, analyzer: standard }
        status: { type: keyword }
        priority: { type: keyword }
        assignee: { type: keyword }
        project_id: { type: keyword }
        tags: { type: keyword }
        due_date: { type: date }
        created_at: { type: date }
  - projects_v1:
      mappings:
        name: { type: text }
        description: { type: text }
        owner: { type: keyword }
        members: { type: keyword }
```

#### Query DSL Design
- **Multi-match:** Cross-field search with boost on title/name fields
- **Filters:** Exact match, range (dates), boolean, nested filters
- **Aggregations:** Facets for status, priority, assignee, tags
- **Pagination:** Cursor-based for deep pagination performance

#### Search API
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/search` | Global search across all entities |
| GET | `/api/v1/search/tasks` | Task-specific search with filters |
| GET | `/api/v1/search/projects` | Project-specific search |
| POST | `/api/v1/search/suggestions` | Autocomplete/typeahead |

#### Filter Syntax (Query Parameters)
```
?q=urgent bug&status=in_progress&priority=high,critical&assignee=me&due_date=next_week
```

#### Performance Targets
- P95 query latency: <50ms
- Index lag: <500ms from DB commit
- Max results per query: 10,000 (with cursor pagination)

---

## Feature 3: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

### Objective
Implement a granular permission system enabling organizations to define custom roles with fine-grained access controls.

### Technical Approach

#### Permission Model
- **Hierarchical:** Organization вҶ’ Project вҶ’ Resource
- **Roles:** Predefined (Admin, Editor, Viewer) + Custom roles
- **Permissions:** Atomic actions (create_task, delete_task, view_report, etc.)
- **Inheritance:** Project permissions inherit from Organization; explicit deny overrides allow

#### Architecture
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                    Permission Check Flow                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  1. Extract user roles from JWT (cached)                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  2. Resolve resource hierarchy (org вҶ’ project вҶ’ item)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  3. Query permission cache (Redis)                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  4. If cache miss: evaluate policy engine (OPA/Casbin)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  5. Cache result (TTL: 5 minutes)                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Policy Engine
- **Library:** Casbin (lightweight, fast, supports ABAC)
- **Model:** RBAC with domains (tenants)
- **Policy Storage:** PostgreSQL with Redis caching layer

#### Casbin Model (rbac_with_domains.conf)
```ini
[request_definition]
r = sub, dom, obj, act

[policy_definition]
p = sub, dom, obj, act

[role_definition]
g = _, _, _

[policy_effect]
e = some(where (p.eft == allow))

[matchers]
m = g(r.sub, p.sub, r.dom) && r.dom == p.dom && r.obj == p.obj && r.act == p.act
```

#### Permission Matrix

| Permission | Admin | Editor | Viewer | Custom |
|------------|-------|--------|--------|--------|
| project:read | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| project:update | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| project:delete | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |
| task:create | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| task:update:any | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| task:update:own | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| task:delete:any | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |
| report:read | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| member:invite | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| role:manage | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |

#### API Endpoints
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/roles` | List roles in organization |
| POST | `/api/v1/roles` | Create custom role |
| PUT | `/api/v1/roles/{id}` | Update role permissions |
| DELETE | `/api/v1/roles/{id}` | Delete custom role |
| GET | `/api/v1/permissions` | List all available permissions |
| POST | `/api/v1/members/{id}/roles` | Assign role to member |

#### Data Model
```sql
CREATE TABLE roles (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id),
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    is_custom BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    permissions TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(organization_id, name)
);

CREATE TABLE user_roles (
    user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    role_id UUID REFERENCES roles(id),
    organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id),
    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id), -- NULL for org-level roles
    assigned_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    assigned_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id, organization_id, project_id)
);
```

---

## Dependencies & Integration Points

### External Services
| Service | Purpose | SLA |
|---------|---------|-----|
| Redis | Caching, Pub/Sub | 99.9% |
| Elasticsearch | Search index | 99.9% |
| SendGrid | Email notifications | 99.5% |

### Internal Dependencies
- **Auth Service:** JWT validation, user context
- **Audit Service:** Permission change logging
- **Analytics Service:** Search query metrics

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| ES cluster failure | High | PostgreSQL fallback; ES multi-node cluster |
| WebSocket scaling | Medium | Load balancer with sticky sessions; horizontal pod scaling |
| Permission complexity | Medium | Comprehensive test suite; gradual rollout with feature flags |
| Cache stampede | Low | Circuit breaker; request coalescing |

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All API endpoints documented in OpenAPI 3.0
- [ ] Unit test coverage вүҘ80%
- [ ] Integration tests for critical paths
- [ ] Load testing (1000 concurrent users)
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Performance benchmarks met
- [ ] Frontend integration verified
- [ ] QA sign-off

---

## Timeline

| Phase | Dates | Deliverables |
|-------|-------|--------------|
| Week 1 | Apr 13вҖ“19 | Notification system core; Search indexing pipeline |
| Week 2 | Apr 20вҖ“26 | RBAC implementation; Integration testing; Documentation |

---

## Appendix

### A. Environment Variables
```bash
# Notifications
NOTIFICATION_REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0
NOTIFICATION_WS_MAX_CONN=1000
NOTIFICATION_BATCH_SIZE=100

# Search
ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://localhost:9200
SEARCH_INDEX_PREFIX=orion_prod
SEARCH_SYNC_BATCH_SIZE=500

# RBAC
CASBIN_MODEL_PATH=/config/rbac_with_domains.conf
PERMISSION_CACHE_TTL=300
```

### B. Monitoring & Alerting
- **Notifications:** WebSocket connection count, message delivery latency
- **Search:** Query latency P95/P99, index lag, cache hit rate
- **RBAC:** Permission check latency, policy evaluation errors
"} <|tool_call_end|> <|tool_calls_section_end|>

## Feature 2: Advanced Search & Filtering

### Objective
Enable users to efficiently find tasks, projects, and documents using full-text search with sophisticated filtering capabilities.

### Technical Approach

#### Search Engine
- **Primary:** Elasticsearch 8.x for full-text search and aggregations
- **Sync Strategy:** Change Data Capture (CDC) via Debezium for near real-time index updates
- **Fallback:** PostgreSQL trigram search for basic queries when ES unavailable

#### Indexing Strategy
```yaml
Indices:
 - tasks_v1:
 mappings:
 title: { type: text, analyzer: standard }
 description: { type: text, analyzer: standard }
 status: { type: keyword }
 priority: { type: keyword }
 assignee: { type: keyword }
 project_id: { type: keyword }
 tags: { type: keyword }
 due_date: { type: date }
 created_at: { type: date }
 - projects_v1:
 mappings:
 name: { type: text }
 description: { type: text }
 owner: { type: keyword }
 members: { type: keyword }
```

#### Query DSL Design
- **Multi-match:** Cross-field search with boost on title/name fields
- **Filters:** Exact match, range (dates), boolean, nested filters
- **Aggregations:** Facets for status, priority, assignee, tags
- **Pagination:** Cursor-based for deep pagination performance

| Method | Endpoint | Description |

| GET | `/api/v1/search/tasks` | Task-specific search with filters |
| GET | `/api/v1/search/projects` | Project-specific search |
| POST | `/api/v1/search/suggestions` | Autocomplete/typeahead |

#### Filter Syntax (Query Parameters)
```
?q=urgent bug&status=in_progress&priority=high,critical&assignee=me&due_date=next_week
```

#### Performance Targets
- P95 query latency: <50ms
- Index lag: <500ms from DB commit
- Max results per query: 10,000 (with cursor pagination)

---

## Feature 3: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

### Objective
Implement a granular permission system enabling organizations to define custom roles with fine-grained access controls.

### Technical Approach

#### Permission Model
- **Hierarchical:** Organization вҶ’ Project вҶ’ Resource
- **Roles:** Predefined (Admin, Editor, Viewer) + Custom roles
- **Permissions:** Atomic actions (create_task, delete_task, view_report, etc.)
- **Inheritance:** Project permissions inherit from Organization; explicit deny overrides allow

#### Architecture
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Permission Check Flow в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 1. Extract user roles from JWT (cached) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2. Resolve resource hierarchy (org вҶ’ project вҶ’ item) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3. Query permission cache (Redis) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 4. If cache miss: evaluate policy engine (OPA/Casbin) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 5. Cache result (TTL: 5 minutes) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Policy Engine
- **Library:** Casbin (lightweight, fast, supports ABAC)
- **Model:** RBAC with domains (tenants)
- **Policy Storage:** PostgreSQL with Redis caching layer

#### Casbin Model (rbac_with_domains.conf)
```ini
[request_definition]
r = sub, dom, obj, act

[policy_definition]
p = sub, dom, obj, act

[role_definition]
g = _, _, _

[policy_effect]
e = some(where (p.eft == allow))

[matchers]
m = g(r.sub, p.sub, r.dom) && r.dom == p.dom && r.obj == p.obj && r.act == p.act
```

#### Permission Matrix

| Permission | Admin | Editor | Viewer | Custom |
|------------|-------|--------|--------|--------|
| project:read | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| project:update | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| project:delete | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |
| task:create | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| task:update:any | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| task:update:own | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| task:delete:any | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |
| report:read | вң“ | вң“ | вң“ | configurable |
| member:invite | вң“ | вң“ | вң— | configurable |
| role:manage | вң“ | вң— | вң— | configurable |

#### API Endpoints
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/roles` | List roles in organization |
| POST | `/api/v1/roles` | Create custom role |
| PUT | `/api/v1/roles/{id}` | Update role permissions |
| DELETE | `/api/v1/roles/{id}` | Delete custom role |
| GET | `/api/v1/permissions` | List all available permissions |
| POST | `/api/v1/members/{id}/roles` | Assign role to member |

#### Data Model
```sql
CREATE TABLE roles (
 id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
 organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id),
 name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
 description TEXT,
 is_custom BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
 permissions TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
 created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
 updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
 UNIQUE(organization_id, name)
);

CREATE TABLE user_roles (
 user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
 role_id UUID REFERENCES roles(id),
 organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id),
 project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id), -- NULL for org-level roles
 assigned_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
 assigned_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
 PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id, organization_id, project_id)
);
```

## Dependencies & Integration Points

### External Services
| Service | Purpose | SLA |
|---------|---------|-----|
| Redis | Caching, Pub/Sub | 99.9% |
| Elasticsearch | Search index | 99.9% |
| SendGrid | Email notifications | 99.5% |

### Internal Dependencies
- **Auth Service:** JWT validation, user context
- **Audit Service:** Permission change logging
- **Analytics Service:** Search query metrics

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| ES cluster failure | High | PostgreSQL fallback; ES multi-node cluster |
| WebSocket scaling | Medium | Load balancer with sticky sessions; horizontal pod scaling |
| Permission complexity | Medium | Comprehensive test suite; gradual rollout with feature flags |
| Cache stampede | Low | Circuit breaker; request coalescing |

---
